name: Emperor Tanuki's Critter Count
name_jp: お<ruby lang="jp"><rb>代</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>狸</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>り</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>様</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>代</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かわ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>算</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ざん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>様</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Cannot be Tributed while face-up in the Monster Zone. While this card is in the Monster Zone, when you Ritual Summon, you can also send 1 monster from your Extra Deck to the GY as 1 of the monsters used for the Ritual Summon. You can only use this effect of "Emperor Tanuki's Critter Count" once per turn.

action: Sends from your Extra Deck to your Graveyard for Ritual Summon
